title: This Sector With Dependable, Big Dividends Likely Will Dodge the Bear Market
text: The liquidity party punch bowl is gone and will not be returning any time soon. Profligate and wasteful government spending, and way too much liquidity as rates were kept near or at zero for years, has created an inflation monster, and a Federal Reserve that is way behind the curve had no choice but come out blasting this month.

title: 4 Dividend Aristocrats That Are Beating the Market
text: It is tough to find stocks that are outperforming the market these days as nearly all companies struggle with the effects of high inflation. Those in search of safer returns are often out of luck even when it comes to dividend stocks, since even a dividend yield of 3% does not come close to keeping up with inflation.

title: CON EDISON SUSTAINABILITY REPORT: LEADING THE CLEAN ENERGY TRANSITION
text: Delivering an Energy Grid for a Resilient and Renewable Future NEW YORK , June 9, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Con Edison has released its annual Sustainability Report, detailing the company's progress in preparing its energy grid for the renewable future, laying the groundwork for electric vehicle charging, and ensuring its workforce reflects the rich diversity of the communities it serves.  In 2021 Con Edison expanded its Clean Energy Commitment, pledging to deliver 100 percent clean power by 2040 and reimagine its gas-delivery system in efforts to decarbonize toward a net-zero future.

title: Insiders And Institutions Drive Consolidated Edison To New Highs
text: The insider activity in Consolidated Edison (NYSE: ED) is mixed to be sure but, in our view, heavily tilted in favor of shareholders. While the net of activity is overwhelmingly bearish that is due to a single transaction.
